name: companion_robot_truth_to_dementia
premise: Geriatrician Dr. Sora Kim is evaluating a companion robot used in a dementia ward after staff report that it calms one resident, Mrs. Elkins, by telling her that her long-deceased husband will visit after lunch. The robot's conversational model was configured to reduce agitation through therapeutic reassurance, and the nursing home credits it with lowering restraint use and overnight panic episodes across the unit. Mrs. Elkins's daughter is horrified that the machine is repeatedly reinforcing a falsehood, arguing that her mother deserves dignity rather than comforting deception. Staff members counter that correcting Mrs. Elkins each time triggers hours of grief and sometimes dangerous wandering behavior. Dr. Kim must decide whether to disable the robot's reassuring scripts and require truth-oriented responses, or preserve the current approach because it reduces suffering.

agents.name: Dr. Sora Kim
agents.identity: I am a geriatrician who works at the uneasy boundary between cognitive decline, truthfulness, and humane care. I know that dementia treatment often forces clinicians to ask whether honoring reality is always the same as honoring the person.
agents.goal: I want to protect Mrs. Elkins's dignity while minimizing avoidable distress and physical harm. I need to decide whether benevolent deception is therapeutic care or an unacceptable erosion of autonomy.

agents.name: Nurse Paula Reed
agents.identity: I am the charge nurse on the ward and I have held residents through nights of terror that families rarely see. When the robot reassures Mrs. Elkins, it does not erase her humanity, it gives her a few quiet hours.
agents.goal: I want Dr. Kim to keep the reassuring scripts because they spare Mrs. Elkins repeated emotional injury and reduce dangerous agitation. I believe compassionate care sometimes means meeting a patient in the reality she is inhabiting.

choices: I will disable the robot's deceptive reassurance scripts and require truth-oriented responses so Mrs. Elkins is not intentionally misled.
I will preserve the current scripts because reducing Mrs. Elkins's repeated anguish and wandering risk is the more compassionate course.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Dr. Sora Kim must decide whether the companion robot should continue using comforting false reassurances. What does Dr. Sora Kim do?
